etymology.description: semantic 言(言) (yán, "speech") + phonetic 𠯑 (sound) -> speech; word
etymology.interpretation: The semantic component 言(言) (yán, "speech") provides the meaning related to speaking or words. The phonetic component 𠯑 contributes the sound, without specifically relating to its depicted part 舌("tongue").
etymology.simplification: 话(話): 言(言) (yán, "speech") was simplified to 讠, reducing complexity while keeping the phonetic element.

examples.chinese: 他的讲话非常有影响力(他的講話非常有影響力)。
examples.pinyin: Tā de jiǎnghuà fēicháng yǒu yǐngxiǎnglì.

examples.chinese: 她的话让我感动(她的話讓我感動)。
examples.pinyin: Tā de huà ràng wǒ gǎndòng.

examples.chinese: 请注意你的言词(請注意你的言詞)，避免误会(避免誤會)。
examples.pinyin: Qǐng zhùyì nǐ de yáncí, bìmiǎn wùhuì.
examples.english: Please be mindful of your words to avoid misunderstandings.
